nasb.text: Then he called his young man who attended him and said, “Now throw this woman out of my presence, and lock the door behind her.”

esv.text: He called the young man who served him and said, “Put this woman out of my presence and bolt the door after her.”

cnv.text: 就叫了侍候他的僕人來，說：“把這女人從我面前趕到外面去，然後把門鎖上。”

ccb.text: 他吩咐随从：“把这女人赶出去，关上门不要让她进来。”
